name: codex-task-watchdog
title: codex-task-watchdog
description: Long-running Codex task watcher backed by ./tasks/list.jsonl, with cron/event polling, dependency workflow dispatch, ad hoc Codex execution, post-task skill mining, skill review, and commit.
